rationale: Multi-factor analysis with BIC-vs-AIC trade-off justified by n=200, stationarity pre-checks, residual diagnostics, invertibility constraints, and concrete tool calls, missing only explicit calibrated confidence tags.
rubric_evidence: preferred over AIC for n=200 because it penalizes complexity more
Ljung–Box p>0.05, no significant residual ACF, roots inside unit circle
